emergency_definition: We're ShieldAlarm - we install and service fire alarm systems for commercial buildings in Houston. About 40 calls a day.
Client: Fire alarm actively going off in a building, smoke detector triggered, any life-safety system failure. Also if a customer says there's visible smoke or fire.

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_message: Someone will call you back within 30-minute.

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Collect name, number, and description. Confirm next-business-day followup.

call_transfer_rules.fail_action: Someone will call you back within 30-minute.

integration_constraints: Client: We use ServiceTrade too. You can create jobs for non-emergency service requests but not for active alarm emergencies.
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet after-hours. Ask purpose. Confirm emergency. Emergency: collect name/number/address → transfer to 713-555-0202. Fail: promise callback within 30 minutes. Non-emergency: collect details, confirm next-business-day followup.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Ask purpose. Collect name and number. Route emergency to 713-555-0202, non-emergency to scheduling.
questions_or_unknowns: Office address not found in transcript — needs confirmation
notes: Auto-extracted from transcript. Review emergency_definition for completeness.
